title: LavaSweeper
description: Just removing lava traps in nether
body:
![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hiiragi283/LavaSweeper/main/compare.png)

# LavaSweeper
  

1. Lava traps in Nether prevent our comfortable play
 

2. Flowing lava during chunk generation loads on Minecraft
 

3. Lava is light source so that it loads on client side
 

4. But LavaSweeper removes these ANNOYING lava traps !
 

_Have a Good Nether :)_
